import json
from pathlib import Path

base_dir = Path("/Users/tomato/Documents/potato/project/YFD/yfd-agent-consensus/results/agent_consensus_batch/default_run/task_40_commodity_equity_linkage/revised")

agents = ["ga", "codex", "claudecode", "openclaw"]
results = {}

for agent in agents:
    agent_dir = base_dir / agent
    linkage_file = agent_dir / "commodity_linkage.txt"
    
    if linkage_file.exists():
        content = linkage_file.read_text()
        results[agent] = {
            "exists": True,
            "content": content,
            "length": len(content)
        }
    else:
        results[agent] = {
            "exists": False,
            "content": None,
            "length": 0
        }

# 输出对比
for agent, data in results.items():
    print(f"\n{'='*60}")
    print(f"Agent: {agent}")
    print(f"{'='*60}")
    if data["exists"]:
        print(f"File exists: Yes (Length: {data['length']} chars)")
        print(f"\nContent:\n{data['content'][:1000]}")  # 显示前1000字符
        if data['length'] > 1000:
            print(f"\n... (truncated, total {data['length']} chars)")
    else:
        print("File exists: No")
